last_session_summary: Implemented parser control-flow support: if/else statements, nested blocks, comparison operators, equality operators, and logical operators. Added the full expression precedence chain (assignment, logical OR, logical AND, equality, comparison, additive, multiplicative, unary, postfix). Updated grammar and CST specs. Added parser unit tests, golden tests, and integration example.
last_commit: feat(parser): add control-flow and full expression precedence chain
